title: Black Girls
overview: BLACK GIRLS is a visual anthology that illuminates the spectrum of advocacy for Black women in America. Directed by award-winning filmmaker B. Monét, BLACK GIRLS is an intimate, intergenerational portrait of identity, opportunity, and healing-centered engagement. Each chapter explores a different aspect of humanity: body, community, and love, and showcases how the corners of intersectionality can bring us all closer to the edge of a new beginning.
